A

absorption(Astrophage, Cell[][]) - Static method in class astrophage.Absorption
A given astrophage absorbs some of the light from a given cell (if there is any) and turns in into energy.
Absorption - Class in astrophage
 
Absorption() - Constructor for class astrophage.Absorption
 
ageMaxRandom() - Static method in class simulation.RandomVariables
Randomizes a maximum age value.
agentAmount - Variable in class simulation.UserInput
 
aging(Astrophage, int) - Static method in class astrophage.Aging
Increases the given astrophage's age by 1.
Aging - Class in astrophage
 
Aging() - Constructor for class astrophage.Aging
 
AllCoreAmount - Static variable in class cell.Core
 
analyze(Astrophage, Cell[][]) - Static method in class astrophage.Moving
Analizes the neighbouring cells of a given astrophage (including the one it's on) and returns the brightest one.
astrophage - package astrophage
 
Astrophage - Class in astrophage
 
Astrophage(int, int) - Constructor for class astrophage.Astrophage
A single Astrophage - the agent.

B

board - package board
 
Board - Class in board
initialized the board
Board(int) - Constructor for class board.Board
 
boardSize - Variable in class simulation.UserInput
 
brightnessRandom() - Static method in class simulation.RandomVariables
Radnomizes a brightness value between 1 and 4.

C

cell - package cell
 
Cell - Class in cell
class responsible fir creating and managing invidual cells of the board
Cell(int, int, List<Astrophage>) - Constructor for class cell.Cell
A single cell that an astrophage can stay on.
Core - Class in cell
All the methods related to managinc cores
Core() - Constructor for class cell.Core
 
coreAmount - Variable in class simulation.UserInput
 
coreCount() - Method in class cell.Core
Increases the ammount of cores currently on the board by 1.
create(int) - Method in class board.Grid
Creates an empty square grid of cells of a given size for the astrophages to move on.
create(Cell[][], int) - Method in class cell.Core
Generates a new core cell and increases the ammount of all and current cores on the board.

D

death(Cell) - Method in class cell.Core
Tells if a given cell is a core that died (brightness = 0).
deciding(Astrophage, Cell[][], int[]) - Static method in class astrophage.Moving
Moves the given astrophage to the brightest neighbouring place on the board.
diffuse(Cell[][], int) - Static method in class cell.Diffusion
Spreads the light between neighbouring cells more equally.
Diffusion - Class in cell
diffuses light from the gradient accross the board
Diffusion() - Constructor for class cell.Diffusion
 
drawBoard() - Method in class simulation.FrontEnd
Renders every frame.

E

energyMaxRandom(int) - Static method in class simulation.RandomVariables
Randomizes a maximum energy value.
energyRandom() - Static method in class simulation.RandomVariables
Radnomizes an energy value.
exhaustion(Astrophage) - Static method in class astrophage.Exhaustion
If a given's astrophage energy is lesser or equal to 0, makes the astrophage not alive.
Exhaustion - Class in astrophage
 
Exhaustion() - Constructor for class astrophage.Exhaustion
 

F

FrontEnd - Class in simulation
the class is responsible for the visual representation to the simulation. it uses javaFx libriary to create GUI
FrontEnd() - Constructor for class simulation.FrontEnd
 

G

getAge() - Method in class astrophage.Astrophage
Gives the current age of this astrophage.
getAgeMax() - Method in class astrophage.Astrophage
Gives the maximum age of this astrophage.
getAgents() - Method in class cell.Cell
Gives the list of all astrophages currently on this cell.
getAllAstroAmount() - Method in class simulation.Simulation
Gives the ammount of all astrophages - dead and alive.
getAstrophage() - Method in class simulation.Simulation
Gives the list of the astrophages currently on the board.
getAstrophageAmount() - Method in class simulation.Simulation
Gives the current ammount of the astrophages on the board.
getAverageEnergy(Simulation) - Static method in class simulation.SimOutput
Calculates the average energy of all astrophages currently on the board.
getBoardCoveragePercentage() - Method in class simulation.Simulation
 
getBrightness() - Method in class cell.Cell
Gives the brightness value of this cell.
getCore() - Method in class cell.Cell
Tells if this cell is a core.
getCoreCount() - Method in class cell.Core
Gives the ammount of cores currently on the board.
getEnergy() - Method in class astrophage.Astrophage
Gives the current energy of this astrophage.
getEnergyMax() - Method in class astrophage.Astrophage
Gives the maximum energy of this astrophage.
getEnvironmentEnergy() - Method in class simulation.Simulation
 
getGrid() - Method in class simulation.Simulation
Gives the current board.
getId() - Method in class astrophage.Astrophage
Gives the Id of this astrophage.
getInput() - Method in class simulation.UserInput
Saves the starting values of the simulation inputted by the user.
getIsAlive() - Method in class astrophage.Astrophage
Tells if the given astrophage is alive.
getIsRunning() - Method in class simulation.Simulation
Tells if the simulation is currently running.
getReproductionLvl() - Method in class astrophage.Astrophage
Gives the reproduction level of this astrophage.
getSimulationSpan() - Method in class simulation.Simulation
Gives the maxumum length of the simulation.
getSize() - Method in class board.Board
 
getSize() - Method in class simulation.Simulation
Gives the size of the board.
getStepCount() - Method in class simulation.Simulation
Gives the current number of performed steps of the simulation.
getX() - Method in class astrophage.Astrophage
Gives the column of this astrophage.
getX() - Method in class cell.Cell
Gives the column of this cell.
getY() - Method in class astrophage.Astrophage
Gives the row of this astrophage.
getY() - Method in class cell.Cell
Gives the row of this cell.
Grid - Class in board
creates grid out of cells
Grid() - Constructor for class board.Grid
 

I

inheritance(Astrophage, Astrophage) - Static method in class astrophage.Inheritance
Makes one astrophage inherit some of the values of another variables.
Inheritance - Class in astrophage
 
Inheritance() - Constructor for class astrophage.Inheritance
 
inheritanceAgeMaxRandom(Astrophage) - Static method in class simulation.RandomVariables
Radnomizes an age value lesser or equal to a given astrophage's one.
inheritanceEnergyMaxRandom(Astrophage) - Static method in class simulation.RandomVariables
Randomizes a maximum energy value between the current and maximum energy value of a given astrophage.
inheritanceEnergyRandom(Astrophage) - Static method in class simulation.RandomVariables
Radnomizes an energy value lesser or equal to a given astrophage's one.
inheritanceRepLvlRandom(Astrophage) - Static method in class simulation.RandomVariables
Radnomizes a reproduction level value lesser or equal to a given astrophage's one.
isEmpty() - Method in class cell.Cell
Tells if a given cell has any astrophages currently on it.

L

lifeLength - Variable in class simulation.UserInput
 
Light - Class in cell
creates gradient of light
Light() - Constructor for class cell.Light
 

M

main(String[]) - Static method in class simulation.FrontEnd
 
move(Astrophage, Cell[][], float) - Static method in class astrophage.Moving
Moves the given astrophage, decreases it's energy and absorbs the light from the cell it moved to.
movementCost - Variable in class simulation.UserInput
 
moveOffset() - Static method in class simulation.RandomVariables
Randomizes an offset value.
Moving - Class in astrophage
 
Moving() - Constructor for class astrophage.Moving
 

P

placeRandom(int) - Static method in class simulation.RandomVariables
Randomizes a row or column on the board.

R

random(int, int) - Static method in class simulation.Randomizer
Generates a random integer value between two given values.
Randomizer - Class in simulation
Random variables for random variables
Randomizer() - Constructor for class simulation.Randomizer
 
RandomVariables - Class in simulation
The class responsible for generating random values for the model
RandomVariables() - Constructor for class simulation.RandomVariables
 
regenerate(float, Cell[][], int, Cell) - Method in class cell.Light
 
removeDeadAstrophages() - Method in class simulation.Simulation
Removes all the dead astrophages from the list of the astrophages currently on the board.
reproduction(Astrophage, List<Astrophage>, int, int) - Static method in class astrophage.Reproduction
Creares a new astrophage based on a given one.
Reproduction - Class in astrophage
 
Reproduction() - Constructor for class astrophage.Reproduction
 
reproductionLvlRandom() - Static method in class simulation.RandomVariables
Randomizes a reproduction level value.

S

setAge(int) - Method in class astrophage.Astrophage
Sets the age of this astrophage to a given value.
setAgeMax(int) - Method in class astrophage.Astrophage
Sets the maximum age of this astrophage to a given value.
setBrightness(float) - Method in class cell.Cell
Sets the brightness of this cell to a given value.
setCore(boolean) - Method in class cell.Cell
Sets the core of this cell to a given value.
setEnergy(float) - Method in class astrophage.Astrophage
Sets the energy of this astrophage to a given value.
setEnergyMax(float) - Method in class astrophage.Astrophage
Sets the maximum energy of this astrophage to a given value.
setIsAlive(boolean) - Method in class astrophage.Astrophage
Sets the alive status of this astrophage to a given value.
setRepLvl(int) - Method in class astrophage.Astrophage
Sets the reproduction level of this astrophage to a given value.
setX(int) - Method in class astrophage.Astrophage
Moves this astrophage to a given column.
setY(int) - Method in class astrophage.Astrophage
Moves this astrophage to a given row.
SimOutput - Class in simulation
Contains major part of the output variables
SimOutput() - Constructor for class simulation.SimOutput
 
simulation - package simulation
 
Simulation - Class in simulation
The class resposible for combining all the elements of the model together and performing the simulation steps
Simulation(UserInput) - Constructor for class simulation.Simulation
The simulation of the whole model.
simulationSpan - Variable in class simulation.UserInput
 
start(Stage) - Method in class simulation.FrontEnd
Collects user input, sets up canvas layers draws initial state and starts the animation timer

U

update() - Method in class simulation.Simulation
Performes all the actions the simulation does in one tick.
UserInput - Class in simulation
The class handles the input of all changable variables
UserInput() - Constructor for class simulation.UserInput
